results.rendered_html:
bhaṅgi or bhaṅgī, f. breaking,  Inscr. 
a bend, curve,  Dhūrtas. ;
a roundabout mode of acting or speaking, circumlocution (˚gyā, ind. ‘in an indirect manner’),  Kāvyād. ;  Daś. ;  Kathās.  &c.;
explaining,  L. ;
mode, manner, way,  Vcar. ;
way of dressing, fashion, toilet,  Bālar. ;  Rājat. ;
(ifc.) mere appearance or semblance of  Kathās. ;  Rājat. ;
fraud, deception,  L. ;
irony, wit, repartee,  W. ;
modesty,  MW. ;
= bhaṅga (with Jainas),  Sarvad. ;
figure, shape,  Siddhāntaś. ;
a step (see bhakti);
a wave,  Naiṣ.
